purpose: Synthetic registry input for no-write source review chain smoke.

sources.name: Synthetic Reviewed Source Example
sources.license_note: Synthetic example only; not an official source.
sources.notes: Temporary no-write registry input for demonstrating a passing source review chain. Do not copy into sources.json.

non_goals: Does not approve any real source.
Does not parse rows or run quality gates.
Does not modify seed data, RAG indexes, or Agent-visible data.
